human_findings.finding: 피부 패치 경계가 아직 보이고, 단순히 원본 위에 덮어씌워진 느낌이 남아 있음.
입도 동그란 패치 경계가 아직 보임.

decision: Do not proceed to Mini Cubism diagnostic preview with the current clean socket, closed underpaint, or mouth_base_clean assets.
next_action: Regenerate or edit clean-base assets using source-face inpaint/native clean-base context, not isolated oval skin patches.
